𝗔𝗪𝗘𝗦𝗢𝗠𝗘-𝗢𝗦𝗜𝗡𝗧-𝗔𝗥𝗦𝗘𝗡𝗔𝗟 | To provide a centralized, easy-to-install, and organized collection of cybersecurity and OSINT tools for security professionals, researchers, and ethical hackers.  ✨ Notable!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a centralized, easy-to-install, and organized collection of cybersecurity and OSINT tools for security professionals, researchers, and ethical hackers.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ 751+ OSINT & Security Tools
✅ 50+ Categories
✅ One-command installer (install.sh)
✅ Categorized installation scripts (osint.sh, redteam.sh, etc.)
✅ Termux support for Android
✅ Multi-distro compatibility (Debian, Ubuntu, Arch, Fedora, etc.)
✅ Includes tools for SOCMINT, GEOINT, network recon, dark web, forensics, and more

🍴 122 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Awesome OSINT Arsenal is a comprehensive shell script toolkit designed for Kali Linux and other Debian-based systems, offering over 750 tools categorized for various cybersecurity tasks. It simplifies the installation and access to tools for reconnaissance, red teaming, blue teaming, digital forensics, hardware analysis, and practice labs, with a special subset for Termux on Android.

𝗞𝗔𝗗𝗥 | AI-assisted video editing with real-time GPU acceleration and integrated AI coding for motion graphics.  ✨ Notable!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: AI-assisted video editing with real-time GPU acceleration and integrated AI coding for motion graphics.
📅 Created: Jun 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Full multi-track editing (video/audio/text)
✅ GPU compositing (WebGL2) for real-time preview and rendering
✅ Keyframing for various properties (position, scale, rotation, opacity, masks)
✅ True 3D capabilities for clips and tracks
✅ Animated masks with multiple shapes and feathering
✅ 26 transitions (overlay and end-to-end)
✅ Local speech recognition (faster-whisper) with word-level timestamps
✅ Automatic animated subtitles with word highlighting
✅ Remotion fragments for programmable motion graphics (React/TSX)
✅ Integrated Claude Code for AI-assisted editing and fragment creation
✅ Fast and efficient export with hardware encoding (WebCodecs)
✅ Background proxies, auto-saving, and cross-project presets


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

Kadr is an AI-native, GPU-accelerated video editor built with Electron, React, and TypeScript. It integrates AI agents directly into the timeline, allowing for real-time editing assistance and automated features like subtitle generation and motion graphics creation.

𝗛𝗢𝗠𝗘𝗥 | A self-hosted, customizable dashboard for organizing and quickly accessing frequently used web services and applications.  🔥 Super Hot!

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A self-hosted, customizable dashboard for organizing and quickly accessing frequently used web services and applications.
📅 Created: Jun 2018 • Updated: Jun 2026

✅ Lightweight & Fast
✅ Low / No maintenance
✅ Simple YAML file configuration
✅ Installable (PWA)
✅ Smart cards
✅ Fuzzy search
✅ Multi pages & item grouping
✅ Theme customization
✅ Keyboard shortcuts

Homer is a lightweight, self-hosted static homepage designed to provide a simple and fast dashboard for managing your server's services. It is configured via a YAML file and offers features like smart cards, fuzzy search, and theme customization.

Penpot is an open-source design and prototyping platform that enables teams to collaborate on digital product development. It emphasizes full ownership of design infrastructure through self-hosting and works with open standards like SVG, CSS, and HTML, integrating design and code with features like Design Tokens and a powerful API.
